description: Dialogue for the Thieves Guild contract board that offers repeatable jobs. Available to Footpad rank and above.

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text: [The board displays various job postings in coded language. A small legend helps members decode the listings.]

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text: [Current job postings:]

choices.text: [Simple Theft] Acquire jewelry from merchant's shop - 100 gold
[Smuggling] Transport package from Dalhurst to Thornfield - 175 gold
[Debt Collection] Collect payment from reluctant debtor - 150 gold
[Intimidation] Deliver Guild message to problem contact - 160 gold
[Burglary] Professional break-in of minor noble manor - 250 gold

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Simple Theft Contract]

Target: Merchant shop in Dalhurst market
Objective: Steal valuable jewelry without detection
Difficulty: Easy
Reward: 100 gold, 150 XP, +5 Guild reputation

[Accept this contract?]

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Smuggling Contract]

Route: Dalhurst to Thornfield
Cargo: Contraband package (contents sealed)
Difficulty: Medium
Reward: 175 gold, 250 XP, +8 Guild reputation
Warning: Guard patrols active on route

[Accept this contract?]

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Debt Collection Contract]

Target: Debtor hiding at Crossroads tavern
Amount Owed: 200 gold
Methods: Persuasion, intimidation, or theft permitted
Difficulty: Medium
Reward: 150 gold, 200 XP, +10 Guild reputation

[Accept this contract?]

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Reconnaissance Contract]

Target: Merchant warehouse in dock district
Objective: Document security measures, guard schedules
Difficulty: Easy
Reward: 125 gold, 175 XP, +7 Guild reputation
Note: Stealth required - no contact with guards

[Accept this contract?]

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Intimidation Contract]

Target: Uncooperative fence in Thornfield
Objective: Deliver Guild message, ensure compliance
Difficulty: Medium
Reward: 160 gold, 220 XP, +9 Guild reputation
Note: Violence optional but not preferred

[Accept this contract?]

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Professional Burglary Contract]

Target: Minor noble manor in Thornfield
Objective: Break in, steal valuables, escape undetected
Difficulty: Hard
Reward: 250 gold, 350 XP, +15 Guild reputation
Requires: Burglar rank or higher
Warning: Heavy security, detection means failure

[Accept this contract?]

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Contract Accepted]

Target location marked. Acquire the specified jewelry and return here. Avoid detection - getting caught voids the contract and damages Guild reputation.

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Contract Accepted]

Package available at the dead drop behind the tavern. Deliver to Silas in Thornfield. Avoid guard searches - confiscation means contract failure and fine.

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Contract Accepted]

Debtor description and location provided. Collect 200 gold by any means necessary. Return payment here. Keep methods discreet - no guard involvement.

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Contract Accepted]

Warehouse location marked. Document guard numbers, patrol timing, lock types, and entry points. Submit report here. Do not engage - observation only.

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Contract Accepted]

Message and target location provided. Deliver personally, ensure understanding. Report compliance or resistance. Prefer non-violent resolution.

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Contract Accepted]

Manor location and basic security layout provided. Entry method your choice. Steal at least three valuable items. Clean escape required - detection voids contract.

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Insert contract proof here]

[The board has a slot for depositing evidence of completed contracts. A mechanism verifies completion and dispenses payment.]

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Contract Verified - Payment Dispensed]

Gold and reputation credited to your Guild account. New contracts refresh daily. The shadows reward those who serve.

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text: [The Guild contract board provides repeatable work for members. Jobs range from simple theft to complex burglary. Higher ranks unlock better-paying contracts. Complete jobs, submit proof, receive payment. Contracts refresh daily.]

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text:
[Access Denied - Insufficient Rank]

Contract board requires Footpad rank or higher. Complete assignments from Raven to advance. New members must prove reliability before accessing repeatable contracts.

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text: [The shadows remember your service. Return when more work is desired.]

nodes.speaker: Contract Board
nodes.text: [The board awaits your return. Work is always available for those who serve the Guild.]
